title: Websocket connection lost in n8n on Synology NAS
symptom: Users experience a 'Connection Lost' message in n8n, indicating frequent disconnections. The network log shows repeated disconnects, suggesting a Websocket issue.
not_this_if: Running n8n without a Reverse Proxy
root_cause: The Websocket connection is not properly established due to the absence of a Websocket configuration in the Reverse Proxy setup on Synology DSM. This can lead to frequent disconnections and a poor user experience.
fix_steps: Access the Reverse Proxy settings in Synology DSM
Create a Websocket rule for the n8n service
Save the configuration and restart the Reverse Proxy
Check the n8n interface for connection stability
agent_instruction: Set up a Websocket rule in the Reverse Proxy settings on Synology DSM.
